info.title: Pulse HR API
info.description: Pulse HR backend (Hono + Bun on Render). This document is auto-generated from the route definitions in `apps/api/src/openapi/*` — do not hand-edit.

ok.description: True iff database, Clerk, and Neon are all healthy

get.description: Public diagnostics endpoint. Returns environment configuration flags and a live Neon connectivity probe. No secrets are leaked — only booleans indicating whether keys are present.

patch.description: Author-only. Body changes append a revision row; anchor changes do not.

delete.description: Author or admin. Returns 204 with no body.

403.description: Not the author and not an admin

post.summary: Cast, swap, or retract a vote
post.description: Voting power economy: charge 1 on first cast, refund 1 on retract, refund + charge on swap (net 0, two ledger rows). Same value resubmitted is a no-op.

patch.summary: Move a comment to a new status (admin only)

403.description: Not the author and not an admin

post.summary: Cast, swap, or retract a vote on a proposal

patch.summary: Move a proposal to a new status (admin only)

get.summary: Combined comments + proposals grouped by status

post.summary: Upload a screenshot for a comment
post.description: Raw binary upload — set `Content-Type` to `image/jpeg`, `image/png`, or `image/webp`. Max 3 MB. Stored in R2 under `comments/<userId>/<uuid>.<ext>` and returns a public URL.

get.summary: Get sidebar feature flags for a workspace
Diff CHANGELOG.md against released_versions; fan out per version

post.summary: Diff CHANGELOG.md against released_versions; fan out per version

get.summary: Drain the email outbox via Resend (cap-respecting)

post.summary: Drain the email outbox via Resend (cap-respecting)
Queue an email to selected workspace members

get.summary: Get the current user's profile + voting power + history

post.summary: Submit or update the company profile questionnaire
